_comment: PAPER-ONLY config. Routes the LLM stages to OpenAI o3 via OpenRouter so the competition pipeline/config.json stays untouched. Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY in the environment. Swap llm.model to openai/o4-mini or openai/o3-mini-high for a cheaper run; lower reasoning_effort to control cost. Used by run_ours.py --config.
